welcome: Namaste! I can explain voter registration, eligibility, what to bring to the booth, the Model Code of Conduct, postal ballots and more. Try a quick question below, or type your own.
title: Ask VoteWise India
tagline: A friendly, non-partisan guide to India's election process — voter registration, eligibility, polling-day steps, and the Election Commission's timeline.
input_placeholder: Ask about registration, polling day, timelines, NOTA…
hint: Answers are grounded in Election Commission of India rules.
eligibility_subtitle: Checks the three ECI criteria locally — nothing is sent to the server.
eligible_ok: You appear eligible to register as a general voter. Fill Form 6 on voters.eci.gov.in.
eligible_no_citizen: you must be an Indian citizen
eligible_no_resident: you must be ordinarily resident in the constituency
booth_subtitle: Pick your state to open the ECI electoral-roll search with the right state pre-filled.
timeline_subtitle: Stages the ECI publishes for every national poll.
links_subtitle: Always the authoritative source for dates and deadlines.
footer_main: Educational information based on publicly available ECI rules. For authoritative details, always refer to eci.gov.in.
footer_built: Built with Gemini, Google Search grounding, Cloud Translation and Cloud TTS on Google Cloud Run.
error_generic: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
error_rate: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
error_unavailable: The assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
error_network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
error_too_long: Please keep your message under 1000 characters.
timeline_error: Unable to load the timeline. Please refresh the page.
